buildCommand: git clone https://github.com/flutter/flutter.git -b stable --depth 1 && cd app && touch .env && ../flutter/bin/flutter build web --release --pwa-strategy=none --dart-define=SUPABASE_URL=$SUPABASE_URL --dart-define=SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=$SUPABASE_ANON_KEY --dart-define=SENTRY_DSN=$SENTRY_DSN --dart-define=APP_ENV=production
